heading: Estimation of costs of meeting defense environmental cleanup milestones required by consent orders
label: 6181 Estimation of costs of meeting defense environmental cleanup milestones required by consent orders
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , War and National Defense, prior to repeal by .section 2590 of Title 50Pub. L. 119–60, § 3111(b)(1)

children.text: a specification of the cost of meeting such milestones during that fiscal year; and
an estimate of the cost of meeting such milestones during the four fiscal years following that fiscal year.
